75143.subject: Important Update to Your Privacy Notice
75143.body: p,ol,ul { margin: 0 !important; } a { color: inherit !important; } @media screen and (min-width: 600px) { .container { padding-top: 60px !important; } } @media screen and (min-width: 600px) { .header-container { padding: 48px 56px !important; } .header-logo { width: 42px !important; height: 42px !important; max-width: 42px !important; max-height: 42px !important; } } @media screen and (min-width: 600px) { .title_text { font-size: 36px !important; padding: 0 60px 48px !important; } } @media screen and (min-width: 600px) { .list { padding: 0 60px !important; } .list_border-top { margin: 0 0 20px !important; } .list_border-bot { margin: 0 0 48px !important; } } @media screen and (min-width: 600px) { .list_label { font-size: 16px !important; } .list_value { font-size: 16px !important; } } @media screen and (min-width: 600px) { .text-module { padding: 0 60px 48px !important; } } @media screen and (min-width: 600px) { .anti-phishing { padding: 0 60px 60px !important; } .anti-phishing_text { margin: 0 !important; } } @media screen and (min-width: 600px) { .single-btn { padding: 0 24px 48px 60px !important; } } @media screen and (min-width: 600px) { .double-btn { padding: 0 60px !important; } .double-btn_top { padding: 0 0 16px 0 !important; } .double-btn_bot { padding: 0 0 48px 0 !important; } } @media screen and (min-width: 600px) { .code_text { font-size: 42px !important; padding: 0 60px 48px !important; } } @media screen and (min-width: 600px) { .table { padding: 0 60px !important; } .table_border-bot { margin: 0 60px 48px !important; } } @media screen and (min-width: 600px) { .table_title { margin-bottom: 16px !important; } } @media screen and (min-width: 600px) { .table_border-top { margin-bottom: 16px !important; } } @media screen and (min-width: 600px) { .table_label { font-size: 16px !important; } .table_value { font-size: 16px !important; } } @media screen and (min-width: 600px) { .footer-container { padding: 60px 60px 80px !important; } .footer-container_social-media { margin-bottom: 40px !important; } .footer-container_social-media-icon { width: 40px !important; } .footer-container_download-section { margin-bottom: 30px !important; } .footer-container_download-section-text { font-size: 24px !important; line-height: 34px !important; width: 162px !important; } .footer-container_download-banner { width: 140px !important; } .footer-container_download-banner-ios { margin-left: 20px !important; } .footer-container_text-section { margin-bottom: 40px !important; } .footer-container_text-section-last { margin-bottom: 0 !important; } .footer-container_footer-text { font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 18px !important; } } u+.body .blend_screen_black { background: #000000; mix-blend-mode: screen; } u+.body .blend_diff_black { background: #000000; mix-blend-mode: difference; } div > u+.body .blend_white_except_gmail_android { background: unset; mix-blend-mode: unset; } div > u+.body .blend_white_only_gmail_android { background: #ffffff; mix-blend-mod
